case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. KEVIN NORRIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORRIS, KEVIN $1,569.01 PRINCIPAL, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,818.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NORRIS, KEVIN
DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NORRIS, KEVIN
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 15243017) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NORRIS, KEVIN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $113.68 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 15118002) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
